name: CROS — Capital Radar Operational Score

capsApplied.reason: High-trust status requires source reliability and decision-outcome ledgers.

categories.label: Live Data Integrity
evidence: Main API cache set to no-store
gaps: Wire live quote endpoint into visible dashboard auto-refresh.
Add explicit market-hours stale action blocker to UI.
Add secondary quote source fallback if Yahoo public endpoint degrades.

categories.label: Reaction Engine
evidence: All evaluated holdings include numeric levels
Every evaluated holding has reaction state and permission
Signal blocks can override price proximity
gaps: Add state-change diffing from prior reaction state.
Make confirmation requirements more ticker-specific.
Tie cost basis/position P&L into risk permissions when available.

categories.label: Visual Decision Surface
evidence: Reaction chips exist in chart renderer
gaps: Continue improving visual hierarchy of the live reaction panel.
Add visible stale/fresh badges beside every holding card price.
Upgrade Opportunity Scout with promote/reject history.

categories.label: Candidate Research Engine
evidence: 16 opportunity scout ideas in live state
gaps: Populate short-term tickerOfMoment lane.
Populate long-term macroFit lane.
Add evidence/source gates before promotion.
Wire candidate funnel to dashboard.

categories.label: Portfolio Risk / Allocation Intelligence
gaps: Add cost basis/cash/real P&L for profit-risk scoreboard.
Add hidden correlation scoring.
Add explicit max allocation bands by bucket.

categories.label: Alert / Human Judgment Queue
gaps: Run a second delta pass after market movement to prove change detection.
Add alert rules only for state changes.
Add human judgment queue to dashboard.
Suppress repeated no-action alerts.

categories.label: Archive / Learning Loop
gaps: Archive machine-readable state snapshots, not just markdown notes.
Track decisions/outcomes after Jun acts or passes.
Add source reliability scoring over time.
Add rule-change log when analysis is corrected.

nextFive: Wire live-reaction-state into dashboard with freshness badges and action blockers.
Add reaction-state diffing so we know what changed since the prior run.
Populate candidate lanes: tickerOfMoment and longTermMacroFit with evidence gates.
Build candidate visual funnel from investigate → add watch → add candidate → rejected.
Add alert rules that fire only on state changes or human-review requirements.
paidDataDecision: No paid data required yet to keep building operational structure.
Paid data may become justified for forward estimates, options IV/Greeks, and more reliable real-time quotes once public stack limits are isolated.
interpretation: Capital Radar is operational enough for structured human decision support.
